description:
A family practice clinic needs to add a new orthopedic surgeon to Oscar EMR's Professional Specialists directory so physicians can create consultation/referral requests to this specialist. Using the credentials (username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117), add the following specialist to the Professional Specialists directory:

- First Name: Rajesh
- Last Name: Patel
- Specialty Type: Orthopedic Surgery
- Street Address: 250 Dundas Street West, Suite 410, Mississauga, ON L5B 1J2
- Phone: 905-555-0147
- Fax: 905-555-0148
- Email: referrals@patelortho.ca
- Website: www.patelortho.ca
- Annotation/Notes: Accepts referrals for joint replacement, sports injuries, and fracture management. Include recent imaging reports with all referrals. Average wait time 6-8 weeks.
